title: Ratio
claim: A ratio compares two quantities by expressing how much of one quantity corresponds to another.

proof_layers.intuitive_explanation: Ratios arise by comparing quantities through division or repeated correspondence.
proof_layers.formal_or_structural_proof: Ratios arise by comparing quantities through division or repeated correspondence.
proof_layers.empirical_or_reconstruction_basis: Reconstructable with simple objects, marks, measurement, or geometric construction depending on the truth.
proof_layers.validation_assessment: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic.
